name: canshare-who-small-intestine-site-histology
title: NZ WHO small intestine site histology
description: Histologies used for small intestine neoplasms(from WHO Classification of Tumours, Digestive Tumours, latest edition, including sections 4. Tumours of the small intestine and ampulla, 11. Haematolymphoid tumours of the digestive system, 12. Mesenchymal tumours of the digestive system, 13. Other tumours of the digestive system (Melanoma only)) or an 'Other' value.
